birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-throated pewee (Contopus albogularis) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, and Suriname.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-eyed black flycatcher (Melaenornis ardesiacus) is a small passerine bird of the genus Melaenornis in the flycatcher family Muscicapidae native to the Albertine Rift montane forests
